original: Duplicate hardcoded program lists in TrialBookingModal and app/book/page.tsx
correction: Derive trial program options from lib/programs-data or a dedicated data file; remove unused list on book page

original: Hardcoded prices in PricingComparison.tsx
correction: Move tier definitions and prices to /data/*.json; load in component

original: activecampaign-webhook error path returns 200
correction: Return 500 for processing failures: NextResponse.json(..., { status: 500 })

original: TrialBookingModal closes without restoring focus
correction: Store previous activeElement; call previousFocus?.focus() in handleClose and effect cleanup

original: ChatWidget send button icon-only without accessible name
correction: Add aria-label="Send message" to the send button

original: ChatWidget calls POST /api/chat but route does not exist
correction: Implement /api/chat with validation and rate limiting, or remove/disable ChatWidget

original: AC_WEBHOOK_SECRET unset skips verification
correction: Require and enforce secret in production; reject when unset in prod

original: VideoTestimonials unused isMobile and containerRef
correction: Remove isMobile state, resize effect, and containerRef

original: API routes return 500 on request.json() parse failure
correction: Return 400 Invalid request format for JSON parse errors

original: Modal with success timeout never clears timeout on unmount
correction: Clear timeout in useEffect cleanup; clearTimeout(ref.current) in return () => {}

original: Modal auto-closes via timeout but focus not restored
correction: When timeout fires call previousActiveRef.current?.focus() before setVisible(false)

original: API route uses inline request.json() try/catch when parseJsonBody exists
correction: Use parseJsonBody(request) from lib/validations; return parsed.response when !parsed.ok

original: Primary CTA on page hero uses bg-brand-sunset-cliff
correction: Use black/white or btn-primary per .cursorrules; Sunset Cliff for hover/accent only

original: LuxuryYearModal shows only result.message on API error
correction: Show result.error when present so server validation message is visible

original: Footer text on bg-brand-deep-water at low opacity (text-white/40, /25)
correction: Use text-white/50 or higher for tagline and secondary text to meet WCAG 7:1 contrast

original: Hero CTA button with only text color on dark gradient (e.g. text-black on from-black/75)
correction: Use solid background (e.g. bg-white) with dark text so contrast meets WCAG; avoid text-only on dark bg

original: Webhook using payload ID (e.g. contactId) in URLs or request bodies without validation
correction: Normalize to positive integer (parseInt + Number.isInteger(id) && id >= 1); return 400 if invalid; use only validated number

original: Webhook secret comparison with === (timing leak)
correction: Use crypto.timingSafeEqual with Buffer.from(expected,'utf8') and Buffer.from(provided,'utf8'); ensure same length before compare or reject

original: Parallax or scroll-driven animation without reduced-motion check
correction: Gate with matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)'); disable parallax or use static fallback when true (e.g. About hero like HomeHero)

original: Inline blockquote with solid border instead of Brand Guide pull-quote
correction: Use PullQuote component or class section-quote for gradient left edge; avoid border-l-2 border-brand-pacific-dusk/30

original: Decorative inline SVG in links/buttons without aria-hidden
correction: Add aria-hidden="true" to the svg element so screen readers skip it

original: Using Tailwind class not in config (e.g. lbta-tan)
correction: Use only defined tokens: lbta-beige or brand-sandstone for warm backgrounds; check tailwind.config before adding color classes

original: Error or required text using raw red (text-red-400, text-red-500, text-red-800) in forms
correction: Use text-lbta-red for error messages and required indicators; error callout use bg-lbta-red/5 border-lbta-red/20 (no raw red-50/red-200)

original: HorizonDivider with optional as prop (e.g. as="hr")
correction: Component always renders <hr>; use variant and className only. No as prop (YAGNI).

original: Using lbta-red for error text on light background without verifying WCAG AAA contrast
correction: Verify with WebAIM Contrast Checker; lbta-red #F04E23 on morning-light #FAF8F4 may be below 7:1; add darker semantic error token if targeting AAA

original: Internal/dev tools (AnalyticsDashboard, ComprehensiveFormTester) using raw red for error or destructive UI
correction: Use text-lbta-red, bg-lbta-red/5, border-lbta-red/20, bg-lbta-red/10 for consistency with user-facing forms and brand palette

original: Hero headline still clipped in some browsers (e.g. Chrome) even with min-h-screen and top-20/24
correction: Use extra top clearance: content area top-24 md:top-28 and pt-16 md:pt-20 so headline is never clipped across Chrome, Safari, Firefox; browser/zoom differences can hide top of content

original: Scroll-spy (IntersectionObserver) using fixed ratio threshold (e.g. > 0.2) with rootMargin that shrinks effective root
correction: With tall sections and rootMargin (e.g. -20% 0 -60% 0), intersection ratio stays well below 0.2; active section never updates. Pick the section with the largest intersection ratio (e.g. ratio > 0) instead of a fixed threshold.

original: Body or description text in footer area (e.g. NewsletterForm) on bg-brand-deep-water at text-white/50
correction: Use text-white/70 or higher for any body/description text in components rendered inside the footer (same deep-water background) so contrast meets WCAG 7:1. Footer tagline and links already at /70; NewsletterForm description was fixed to text-white/70.

original: Logging full third-party API error response body (e.g. GHL create contact 4xx)
correction: Truncate response body (e.g. text.slice(0, 100) + '…') or log only status code; full body may contain PII or internal details

original: Script that calls external API (e.g. Vercel) rejects with full response body in Error message
correction: On non-OK response reject with status only: Promise.reject(new Error('Vercel API error: ' + res.status)); do not include res.text() or response body in the error — body can contain tokens or account details

original: CLI/script catch block logs full error object (console.error(err))
correction: Log only a safe message: console.error('Label:', err instanceof Error ? err.message : err); avoid logging err (and thus stack or any sensitive message) in production-facing scripts

original: Form API returns 500 on valid payload when rate limit or optional integration fails
correction: Wrap rateLimit in try/catch and allow request on failure; use parseJsonBody that returns 400 on any parse error (never throw); fire-and-forget integrations: void fn().catch(e => console.error(...)); return 200 when validation passes

original: parseJsonBody rethrows non-SyntaxError so route catch returns 500
correction: In parseJsonBody catch all errors and return { ok: false, status: 400 }; do not throw so consuming routes never get 500 from body parse

original: Hardcoded overview fromPrice fallbacks (25, 31, 50, 55, 58, 120) and camp 3-day prices (435, 375) in lib
correction: Move to data: pricing-supplemental.json programsOverviewFallbacks; year2026.json threeDayFullPrice/threeDayHalfPrice per camp; lib reads and uses with code fallback only as last resort

original: API route (e.g. /api/book) calls rateLimit() without try/catch so KV failure causes 500
correction: Wrap rateLimit() in try/catch; on throw use fallback { allowed: true, remaining: maxRequests, resetTime: Date.now() + interval } so route never 500s from rate limiter

original: Footer social icons or labels at text-white/60 on bg-brand-deep-water
correction: Use text-white/70 or text-white/80 for all text and icon color on deep-water so every element meets 'all text on deep-water ≥ 70%' rule

original: Section overline or eyebrow (e.g. 'Our Network') with no explicit color in a brand section
correction: Add explicit text-brand-pacific-dusk (or appropriate token) so section uses only brand tokens; avoid inherited/gray color

original: NewsletterForm eyebrow or placeholder on deep-water below 70% contrast
correction: Use text-white/80 for eyebrow label and placeholder-white/50 for input placeholder so all footer-area text meets strict deep-water contrast rule

original: ProgramRow getPrice() when program has monthly and 2x shows From $200/season instead of $120/mo
correction: Prefer monthly when primary: if monthly != null and (no season prices OR monthly <= min(seasonPrices)) return { amount: monthly, label: '/mo' }; remove 4x/5x branches

original: ProgramsSection imports winter2026.json and uses winter2026Data.programs for winter tab
correction: Use getWinter2026Programs() from @/lib/programs-data; remove direct JSON import so programs-data is single entry point for all season program lists

original: Winter orange-ball/green-dot have Friday Match Play only in description; no matchPlay or pricingNote
correction: Add matchPlay and pricingNote to Winter JSON; same shape as Spring-Summer and Fall; keep description without duplicate sentence

original: Dead exports getSpringPrograms and getSummerPrograms in lib/programs-data.ts
correction: Remove them; only getSpringProgramsForDisplay and getSummerProgramsForDisplay are used

original: Webhook endpoint without rate limiting
correction: Add rateLimit('webhook:'+ip, RATE_LIMITS.webhook) at top of POST with try/catch; allow on failure. In production return 401 when AC_WEBHOOK_SECRET unset; no user-supplied field values in prod logs

original: Two implementations of same component (root AnimatedSection vs ui/AnimatedSection)
correction: Single canonical in ui/; root file re-exports: export { default } from '@/components/ui/AnimatedSection' so existing imports keep working

original: addTags() applying tags sequentially in lib/activecampaign.ts
correction: Use Promise.all(tagIds.map(id => addTag(contactId, id))) for parallel application; same success/failed counts

original: Raw hex in globals.css (e.g. .btn-primary:hover #27272a)
correction: Use design token: var(--deep-water) or other :root variable; no raw hex in design system

original: Registration modal pricing in lib/form-config.ts (prePopulateData.pricing) duplicated from /data
correction: Derive modal pricing from programs-data, camps-data, or year2026 at runtime; or keep single shared config in /data and import in form-config; document sync requirement if keeping as display-only copy

original: Chatbot quick-reply buttons using generic emoji (🎾 📅 💰 📞)
correction: Use text labels only or non-generic icons (e.g. Lucide); .cursorrules forbid generic emoji icons in UI

original: Next.js 16 turbopack root under experimental.turbo
correction: Use top-level turbopack: { root: __dirname } in next.config.js; experimental.turbo is invalid in Next 16

original: Schedule slot note uses abbreviation (e.g. LBHS) while other slot-level venue text in same file uses full name (LB High School)
correction: Use consistent wording: 'LB High School' in slot note so Pattern Recognizer and display match rest of data

original: lib/form-config.ts prePopulateData.location for a program (e.g. Youth Development) differs from season JSON location
correction: Align form-config location with canonical program location in data/winter2026.json (and same program in other season files); single source of truth for display and forms

original: Program description repeats venue/location already in program.location and schedule slot .note
correction: Keep description lean; let location string and per-slot note carry where/when; description for positioning and pricing only (e.g. Same pricing as Youth Dev tiers)

original: Program description includes date-specific text (e.g. starting April) that will age
correction: Use location or season context only (e.g. Alta Laguna Park); avoid 'starting April' or similar unless intentionally time-bound and documented for update

original: Level- or invitation-based programs had no way for edge-case families (e.g. under age but UTR-qualified) to ask about placement
correction: For programs with placement gates (level, invitation, coach approval), use description + optional pricingNote + optional inquiryLabel and link to contact; apply placement-inquiry-unified pattern consistently (Youth Dev done; consider Green Dot Competitive, High Performance)

original: Middleware protects route (e.g. /coach-hub) with env secret but returns next() when secret unset
correction: When path is protected and secret missing, redirect to login or return 503; never allow access when unconfigured

original: Modal/overlay (BinderOverlay, GuideOverlay) without focus trap and Escape-to-close
correction: Add onKeyDown(Escape → onClose) and focus trap (e.g. focus first focusable on open)

original: Clear-cookie header does not set Secure when session cookie was set with Secure in production
correction: Include Secure in clear-cookie string when NODE_ENV === 'production', matching buildCoachHubSetCookie

original: Submit or CTA button with min-width larger than smallest viewport (e.g. min-w-[300px] at 320px)
correction: Use w-full and optionally max-w-[300px], or min-w-0 with flex so button does not force horizontal scroll; audit at 320px

original: Form inputs (text, email, tel, select, textarea) with font-size below 16px on mobile
correction: Use text-[16px] or text-base for inputs to avoid iOS zoom on focus; Contact form and LuxuryRegistrationModal inputs were 15px

original: Next 16 page using searchParams synchronously
correction: In Next 16, searchParams (and params) are Promises. Make page async and type searchParams as Promise<{ ... }>; await searchParams before reading

original: Filter or toggle buttons with min-height below 48px
correction: Use min-h-[48px] for all interactive buttons (WCAG touch target); ScheduleCalendarView location filter was 40px

original: Auth API 400/401 only verifiable when COACH_HUB_SECRET set; validation showed warning until runtime check
correction: Add a verification script (e.g. scripts/verify-coach-hub-auth.mjs) that runs against dev server with secret set; assert POST {} → 400, POST { password: 'wrong' } → 401; document in validation summary or README

original: Contact page 5s success timeout with no cleanup; setState can run after unmount if user navigates away
correction: Store timeout id in useRef; in useEffect cleanup return () => clearTimeout(ref.current)

original: Multiple ProgramCards expanded at once → multiple fixed bottom bars; Register may open wrong program
correction: Lift expanded id to parent (expandedProgramId); pass isExpanded and onToggle so only one card expands; single sticky bar

original: Form API 400 returns raw validation.error (Zod field names and messages) to client
correction: Return generic message to client (e.g. 'Invalid request. Please check your input.'); log validation.error server-side only. Optionally return sanitized field-level errors for inline form errors

original: Modal success view (e.g. 'Request Received') does not move focus to first focusable in success state
correction: When setting isSuccess(true), focus the first focusable in the success view (e.g. close button) in useEffect or after state update so focus does not land on body

original: Thank-you or confirmation page with focusable links (tel, mailto, Return, app store) but no visible focus ring
correction: Add focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-victoria-cove focus:ring-offset-2 rounded-sm (or ring-white on dark sections) to every focusable link so keyboard users get visible focus

original: Thank-you or confirmation page step/card styling with raw blue (text-blue-600, bg-blue-100) instead of brand tokens
correction: Use brand tokens (e.g. text-brand-victoria-cove, bg-brand-victoria-cove/10) for step numbers and accents so palette stays within .cursorrules

original: Coach bio or schedules linking to /book without type or coach context
correction: Link to /book?type=private&coach=<slug>; resolve slug to display name on book page; pass defaultCoach to modal so form pre-selects that coach. Single source for slug↔name: data/coaches.json via lib/coach-slug

original: Coach headshots not updating after deploy (same URL, CDN/browser cache)
correction: Use COACH_IMAGE_VERSION and coachImageSrc(path) in lib/coaches-data.ts; append ?v=N to every coach image URL; bump version when replacing assets so browsers and CDN fetch new files

original: Coach image mapping by number (1,2,3,4) when user provides named files
correction: When user provides named assets (e.g. Andrew_Bio_pic-*.png, Robert_bio_pic-*.png), copy those to canonical public paths (andrew-headshot.png, robert-lebuhn.png); prefer named files over numbered when both exist

original: next.config images.localPatterns only /images/** while next/image uses /logos or /photos
correction: Add every public prefix used by <Image src="/..."> to images.localPatterns (e.g. /logos/**, /photos/**); smoke _next/image URLs in prod → 200 not 400 INVALID_IMAGE_OPTIMIZE_REQUEST

original: Fixed header bg-brand-morning-light/90 over full-bleed dark hero with text-brand-pacific-dusk nav
correction: Use opaque bg-brand-morning-light (no alpha) so nav meets WCAG contrast; optional border-b; avoid translucent bar over dark video/photo

original: Video or overlay play button (icon only) without accessible name
correction: Add type="button" and aria-label describing the action (e.g. aria-label={\`Play video about ${story.name}\`})

original: ChatWidget close button (32px) without min-h-[48px] and focus-visible:ring
correction: Add min-h-[48px] min-w-[48px] and focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-sunset-cliff focus-visible:ring-offset-2 to close button; use Tailwind classes instead of inline styles for consistency

original: ChatWidget sendMessage useCallback includes messages in dependency array causing unnecessary re-renders
correction: Remove messages from deps; use functional setState (prev => [...prev, ...]) and build history array inside the callback from the updated state

original: Racquet Rescue page using legacy lbta-* tokens (lbta-primary, lbta-secondary, lbta-bone) instead of brand-* tokens
correction: Replace all lbta-primary with brand-pacific-dusk, lbta-secondary with brand-pacific-dusk/70, lbta-bone with brand-sandstone or brand-morning-light per .cursorrules Part 7

original: Racquet Rescue CTAs using focus:ring instead of focus-visible:ring, or missing focus rings entirely
correction: Use focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-victoria-cove focus-visible:ring-offset-2 consistently on all interactive elements; focus:ring applies on mouse click which is not desired

original: Using POST /api/3/campaigns/{id}/test for ActiveCampaign test emails
correction: Use legacy GET /admin/api.php?api_action=campaign_send with campaignid, messageid (from GET /api/3/campaigns/{id}/campaignMessages), action=test, email, type=mime. v3 endpoint returns 405 on many accounts. See send_test.py and docs/ACTIVECAMPAIGN_EMAIL_DESIGNER_LIMITATION.md

original: PlayerSuccessCarousel with fixed center objectPosition for all slides
correction: Each slide needs its own objectPosition stored in data JSON; player photos require top-weighted positioning (50% 10%-15%) to keep faces visible in wide hero bands with object-cover

original: Carousel min-height too short, cropping player faces
correction: Use min-h-[65vh] lg:min-h-[76vh] for player success carousel to reduce vertical crop pressure; shorter bands force more aggressive object-cover cropping

original: Facility images referenced ad-hoc without documented intent mapping
correction: Map facility images by visual intent (hero/OG, destination/scale, detail/strip, coaching/narrative) and document assignments in docs/photo-map-routing.md; store assignments in data JSON

original: HomeHero referenced /videos/LBTA-Home-Hero.mp4 but file was not in public/videos (404)
correction: Remove dead source tag or add file; ship with WebM + legacy-working-assets MP4 only until canonical MP4 is added

original: AC division tag lookup using data.program for UTR registrations
correction: Use data.division || data.program for getUtrDivisionTag(); register-year receives division from modal payload

original: Division labels with en-dash (UTR 2.0–4.0) failing slug lookup in getUtrDivisionTag
correction: Normalize unicode dashes: .replace(/[\u2013\u2014\u2212]/g, '-') before slug lookup

original: form-config duration hardcoded for utr-circuit while leagues JSON has seasonLabel
correction: Derive via getUtrCircuitFormDuration() from JSON; add test that duration matches season

original: Leagues Zod schema omitted ntrpToUtr; parse strips it
correction: Add ntrpToUtr to leagues utr schema so parsed data includes it

original: Program landing with mailto primary CTA when LuxuryYearModal and API exist
correction: Wire LuxuryYearModal as primary CTA; keep mailto as secondary for edge questions

original: Player Success slides with object-cover cropping heads in wide hero band
correction: Use imageFit contain in data/homepage-copy.json and/or replace art with Cloudinary f_auto,q_auto URLs framed for hero; optionally return to cover with per-slide objectPosition (e.g. top-weighted) once art is safe

original: Carousel slide imageAlt names Ryan while image file is shared Olov hero asset
correction: Upload Ryan-specific image and update slide URL, or revise imageAlt to describe visible content without wrong name attribution until asset exists

original: Pathway planner displayed client-calculated monthly/annual dollar ranges not sourced from /data
correction: Do not show numeric tuition from ad-hoc math; link to /schedules (SSOT) and explain variance by program/season/frequency

original: Thin page (e.g. /match-play) metadata described generic programs while body said offering unavailable
correction: Match title, description, and OG to page truth; replace legacy-only hero assets with on-brand /images when available; give dual CTAs to related live pages

original: Root layout preload + video poster + next/image all fetching the same hero-poster.webp
correction: Single owner: next/image priority on homepage; video preload=none, no poster attr if same URL; remove global layout preload for homepage-only LCP

original: Coach Hub route protection in middleware.ts after Next.js 16 migration
correction: Use proxy.ts with export function proxy(request) and config.matcher; identical auth logic; build lists Proxy (Middleware)

original: Contact page POST includes message but bookingSchema had no message field
correction: Add optional message (max 2000) to bookingSchema; explicit JSON payload from contact page

original: /api/book treated contact-page submissions as trials (tags, trial confirmation email)
correction: Branch on source===contact-page: AC contact + not_sure tags, Notion Contact, sendContactFormConfirmationEmail, notifyTrialRequest intent contact

original: UtrDropInSchedule used Link without import
correction: Use <a href="#divisions"> for same-page anchor or import next/link Link
